title: EnderChest SMP Recommended Modpack
description: Official modpack for the EnderChest SMP Minecraft server, providing required mods, performance optimizations, and multiplayer features needed to join the server.
body:
This is the **official modpack for the EnderChest SMP Minecraft server**.

The EnderChest SMP modpack includes all **required client-side mods** needed to join and play on the server correctly. It is built on **Fabric** for maximum performance, fast load times, and stability, while keeping the gameplay experience close to vanilla.

## 📦 What’s Included
- Fabric-based mod loader for optimal performance
- Performance and quality-of-life improvements
- **Simple Voice Chat** for proximity-based communication
- **Emotecraft** for player emotes and expression
- Shader support for enhanced visuals
- Curated resource packs for immersion
- Custom mod loading screen

## ⚠️ Important Information
- This modpack is **only intended for use on the EnderChest SMP server**
- Not designed for singleplayer or other multiplayer servers
- All included mods are required to ensure compatibility

If you are playing on **EnderChest SMP**, install this modpack to guarantee the best and intended experience.
